Bases: AppConfig

Configuration for the core app.

name = 'core'¶

core.models module¶

core.tests module¶

core.urls module¶

core.views module¶

core.views.editor_dashboard(request)¶

Display editor moderation dashboard.

Defensive features: - Editor approval validation - Safe query filtering - Exception protection

core.views.home(request)¶

Display homepage with featured publications.

Defensive features: - Safe query execution - Exception protection

core.views.home_redirect(request)¶

Redirect users to role-based dashboards.

Defensive features: - Safe role detection - Fallback redirect

core.views.journalist_dashboard(request)¶

Display journalist articles and newsletters.

Defensive features: - Query optimisation - Exception handling

core.views.landing_page(request)¶

Redirect authenticated users to their dashboard.

core.views.reader_dashboard(request)¶

Display reader subscriptions.

Defensive features: - Safe relationship queries - Exception protection
